operatorReportedClearances.note: Operator reported audit and legal requirements cleared.

finalPublicStatusUpdate.headline: AstraTreasury governance decision is recorded for restricted Base Mainnet operation.
finalPublicStatusUpdate.summary: AstraTreasury remains in restricted Base Mainnet operation. The governance decision is recorded for an all-disabled capability posture. Full launch, public token sale, real treasury funding, staking/rewards, buybacks, autonomous execution, paper-to-on-chain automation, mainnet execution queue activation, Safe payload generation, and Safe transaction execution remain not approved.

hardRule: This public status update is finalized only for restricted-mode / all-disabled status. It does not approve full launch or any restricted capability.
